title: Evangelion panel at Anime Weekend Atlanta
display_title: Evangelion panel at Anime Weekend Atlanta
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion panel at Anime Weekend Atlanta             Quote Post by Carl Horn » Mon Sep 11, 2006 11:20 am To celebrate the 10th anniversary of the first time Evangelion was over, completed, and done with, there will be a panel on, you guessed it, Neon Genesis Evangelion at Anime Weekend Atlanta, this forthcoming weekend of September 22-24. If Eva had been shot in the Deep South a la Raiders of the Lost Ark: The Adaptation , Episode 12 would have ended with Misato and the Children at the Waffle House, and, cosplayers being bold these days, I wouldn't entirely rule out catching the sight. â€”C.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Sep 11, 2006 11:59 am I wish I could be there. We would rock out yo.

Article: Evangelion panel at Anime Weekend Atlanta
[]: Evangelion panel at Anime Weekend Atlanta             Quote Post by Carl Horn » Mon Sep 11, 2006 11:20 am To celebrate the 10th anniversary of the first time Evangelion was over, completed, and done with, there will be a panel on, you guessed it, Neon Genesis Evangelion at Anime Weekend Atlanta, this forthcoming weekend of September 22-24. If Eva had been shot in the Deep South a la Raiders of the Lost Ark: The Adaptation , Episode 12 would have ended with Misato and the Children at the Waffle House, and, cosplayers being bold these days, I wouldn't entirely rule out catching the sight. â€”C.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Sep 11, 2006 11:59 am I wish I could be there. We would rock out yo.
